sizing_rule.note: Optimal f sizing: divide total equity by (1/optimal_f). Example: optimal_f=0.04 means 1 contract per $25,000 equity ($25,000 / 25 = 1 contract). Derived from cumulative probability analysis of scenario outcomes.

source_rule_text: Position size using optimal f derived from cumulative probability analysis of scenario outcomes, where optimal f of 0.04 means trading 1 contract per $25,000 in equity.
